summary.zh: 结合机理模型、优化算法和机器学习，研究综合能源系统、清洁能源消纳、需求响应与低碳调度。
summary.en: Combining physical models, optimization and machine learning for integrated energy systems, renewable integration, demand response and low-carbon dispatch.

summary.zh: 利用多源环境监测、遥感和城市运行数据，开展污染暴露、空气质量、碳排放和生态环境风险分析。
summary.en: Using multi-source monitoring, remote sensing and urban data to analyze pollution exposure, air quality, carbon emissions and environmental risk.

summary.zh: 面向能源环境应用中的不确定性、可解释性和泛化问题，构建物理约束、因果启发和人机协同的AI方法。
summary.en: Developing physics-aware, causality-inspired and human-in-the-loop AI methods for uncertainty, interpretability and generalization in energy and environmental applications.
